title: Implement Task Interruption for Hunger
description:
Villagers starve because they don't interrupt tasks to eat.

Requirements:
1. Implement a task stack/interruption system.
2. Units must be able to pause tasks (Building, Gathering, Workshop) when hungry.
3. Units should keep carried items while eating and finish delivery afterward.
4. Save 'workProgress' so the progress bar resumes correctly.
5. Units must return to their saved task automatically after eating.

title: Rebalance Gathering and Crafting Times
description:
Rebalance all work tasks to be faster for a better gameplay loop.

Requirements:
1. Tree Felling: 5s (down from 16s/28s).
2. Wood Gather (felled): 2s (down from 10s).
3. Crop Harvest: 2s (down from 6s).
4. Berry Harvest: 1s (down from 5s).
5. Stone/Ore Quarrying: 3s (down from 14s).
6. Workshop tasks: rebalance to similar scale (e.g., ~2-5s per unit).

title: Fix Building Construction Progress Bar
description:
Construction progress bars are invisible for player buildings because of an early return statement in 'BuildingManager.js'.

Requirements:
1. Move construction progress bar drawing logic before the 'return' in 'redrawBuildingBar'.
2. Ensure both construction progress and damage bars can coexist.

title: Add Berries to Storage
description:
Berries were added as a food source, but buildings need to be updated to support storing them.

Requirements:
1. Update BLDG definitions for 'house', 'granary', and 'townhall' to include 'berries' in their 'stores' object.
2. Ensure the storage logic supports berries.

title: Implement Physical Tithe Delivery
description:
Tithe collection currently happens magically at dawn. 

Requirements:
1. Remove automatic dawn transfer to public commons.
2. Add a 'collect_tithe' task for workers.
3. Workers must travel to buildings with tithePending > 0, pick it up, and deliver it to the Town Hall.
4. Public resources only increase when the tithe physically reaches the Town Hall.

title: Implement Active Replanting Task
description:
Farms should not auto-regrow; farmers must actively replant them after harvest.

Requirements:
1. When farm stock hits 0, set state to 'needsPlanting'.
2. Add 'plant' task type for farmers.
3. Farmer must walk to farm and work for 6s to plant.
4. Regrowth timer starts ONLY after planting is complete.

title: Implement Burst Harvesting and Regrowth Cycle
description:
Current farming is too slow to support a household. 

Requirements:
1. Update 'UnitManager.js' to reduce the harvest work threshold from 25.0 to 6.0 (allows ~12 harvests per day).
2. Increase Farm 'maxStock' to 24 units.
3. Implement a regrowth mechanic where an emptied field takes one full Day phase to reset.
4. Design Goal: One farmer can harvest enough for 2 days of bread in a single day, then perform other duties while the field regrows.

title: Link Attributes to Work Performance
description:
Unit attributes currently have no impact on work speed, making them mostly aesthetic for production. 

Requirements:
1. Apply attribute multipliers to workSpeed across all tasks.
2. Mapping:
   - STR: Mining, Woodcutting, and Construction speed.
   - DEX: Farming, Archery, and Workshop (Crafting) speed.
   - INT: Workshop (Crafting) speed (combined with DEX).
3. Ensure the UI (Info Panel) reflects these bonuses so players can see why one worker is faster than another.

title: 22. Per-building isPublic shown clearly in info panel
description: File: js/scenes/UIManager.js. Add an ownership badge ([STATE] in #c8a030 or [PRIVATE] in #6a5840) to the building info panel based on b.isPublic. Skip for houses.

title: 21. Auto-save indicator
description: Files: js/scenes/UIManager.js, js/scenes/GameScene.js. Add a "saved" flash in the HUD after auto-save. Call showSaveFlash() in GameScene's _saveGame. In UIManager, create a temporary fading text object.

title: 20. Worker nutrition bar in unit panel
description: File: js/scenes/UIManager.js. Add a nutrition bar (u.dailyNutrition) below the HP bar in _renderUnitInfo. Use green/yellow/red based on level. Shift content down to fit.

title: 19. Tithepending + wagepending display in building panel
description: File: js/scenes/UIManager.js. Show b.tithePending and b.wagePending in _renderBuildingInfo if non-zero. Display "tithe: X res" (#c8a030) and "wages: X" (#aac870) below inventory.

title: 18. Census panel — population list
description: File: js/scenes/UIManager.js. Add a "Census" view to the left info panel when no selection is made. List living workers grouped by role (e.g., Farmer x3, Miller x2, Idle x4), sorted by count descending. Cap at 10 lines.

title: 17. Fog reveal from all built player buildings
description: File: js/scenes/MapManager.js. Give all player buildings a default fog reveal radius of 3 tiles if no explicit fogRadius is set. Fixes the default fallback in revealFog() from 10 to 3.

title: 16. Building construction progress bar
description: File: js/scenes/BuildingManager.js. Add a progress bar above buildings under construction. In redrawBuilding, draw a bar background (0x333322) and fill (0x88aa44) based on buildWork progress. Import BUILD_WORK from gameConstants.js.

title: 15. Idle worker pulse indicator
description: File: js/scenes/UnitManager.js. Make idle workers (no role, age >= 2) visually distinct with a slow yellow pulse ring. In redrawUnit, draw a stroking circle using Date.now() for the pulse effect.

title: 14. Paved road placement tool
description: Files: js/scenes/UIManager.js, js/scenes/MapManager.js, js/scenes/GameScene.js. Allow placing ROAD_PAVED by clicking tiles (cost: 1 stone). Add roadMode to GameScene state. In UIManager, add "Road" toggle button in actions zone. In GameScene, handle map clicks when roadMode is active to place roads and deduct cost.

title: 13. Season name in HUD
description: Files: js/scenes/UIManager.js, js/config/gameConstants.js. Add SEASONS ['Spring', 'Summer', 'Autumn', 'Winter'] and SEASON_DAYS = 8 to gameConstants.js. In UIManager.js, update updateHUD() to compute season based on day and append season name to dayInfo text (e.g., ☀ D3 Spring).

title: 12. Resource node respawn
description: Files: js/scenes/WorldManager.js, js/config/gameConstants.js. Depleted resource nodes (n.stock <= 0) never come back. Add a respawn system: Add respawnDays to NODE_DEF in gameConstants.js (berry_bush: 3, wild_garden: 4, olive_grove: 5, small_tree: 6, large_tree: 10, small_boulder: 12, large_boulder: 20, ore_vein: 25, scrub: 4). In WorldManager.js, add tickNodeRespawn() called from endNight() to iterate resNodes and handle respawn timers, resetting stock and redrawing node with float text when timer expires. large_tree and large_boulder should not respawn.

title: Add Felling Progress Bar
description:
Tree felling is invisible, making it look like workers are idle or stuck.

Requirements:
1. Add 'fellProgress' to tree node state.
2. Add a rendering routine to show a progress bar above trees during felling phase.
3. Keep the bar synced with 'fellWork'.

title: Rebalance Berry Bush Yields and Add Berries
description:
Berry bushes currently yield 'wheat', which is confusing. 

Requirements:
1. Add 'berries' to NUTRITION constants (suggested value: 0.2).
2. Update 'NODE_DEF' to have berry_bushes yield 'berries'.
3. Ensure units can correctly identify and gather the new berry resource.

title: Rebalance Gathering Speeds for Stone and Ore
description:
Currently, stone/ore gathering is 2.5x slower (25s) than post-felling wood (10s), which feels excessively slow. 

Requirements:
1. Update 'UnitManager.js' to change the work threshold for stone/ore from 25.0 to 14.0.
2. This aligns stone gathering to be 'slightly slower' than the total effective rate of woodcutting (~11.5s per log including felling time).
